name: core.openwop.mcp
description: Spec-canonical MCP-operation pack. Four nodes for workflow-author-direct interaction with registered MCP servers — list-tools, invoke-tool, read-resource, server-status. Complements the implicit LLM-mediated tool-call path documented in spec/v1/mcp-integration.md by exposing the same MCP operations as first-class workflow nodes. Routes through the host's MCP client (ctx.mcp.* surface); the pack itself speaks no MCP protocol.
author: OpenWOP Working Group
